name: loop-stack
description: Universal, config-driven autonomous dev loop stack: session crons that fix assigned bugs, verify against AC + deploys, review requested PRs, shepherd your own PRs to merge (review-respond / CI-fix / conflict-resolve), repair failed deployments, keep fix-base branches synced, and post a daily standup report with parked-item escalation. Project specifics live in .claude/stack.md, written and refreshed by the onboard skill (re-runnable, observes your PR + deploy systems).
